---
title: "Select Access Contact Information"
category: "Contact Information"
section_id: "select-access"
last_updated: "2026-07-01"
source: "UF Neurology Resident Handbook 2026-2027"
---

# Select Access Contact Information

SELECT contact for access

**Leeann Bains**| *Shared Services **Credentialing  Specialist** I*

**Select Medical CVO** | *Select Specialty **&** Rehab Hospitals*

4720 Gettysburg Road

Mechanicsburg, PA 17055

Office: 205-815-6929|Fax: 717-635-3146| [**lbradenbrown@selectmedical.com**](mailto:lbradenbrown@selectmedical.com)
